description: Casual dressing only gets better with these sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Upper Leather upper covering the forefoot and midfoot for maximum durability, breathability and style Cushioned textile lining for added comfort Stitch detailing for added strength Brand name embossed on the side Cushioned leather and suede covered footbed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
